0.0.1.description:
First release of the Archipelago CCS Randomizer 🎉 

See [https://github.com/aymeric-duchein/Archipelago-ccs for Archipelago](https://github.com/aymeric-duchein/Cash-cleaner-randomizer/releases/tag/Archipelago-0.0.1) for client mod implementation. 

Add the APworld to your archipelago install then generate a new game. An archive named "player"_ccs_ap_config.zip is generated for each CCS player. Extract it in the Saved folder of the mod

It should look like this: 
/Randomizer
-- /Saved
---- ap_config.lua

Between two separate Archipelago game: make sure to remove the ap_config.lua and state.lua from the Saved folder or it won't work

If you see any problem please create issues 🙏 

This is for testing only => do not use this is in large events before tseting it properly
0.0.1.title: Play test release 0.0.1
